title: athyrium nikkoense
intro: Athyrium nikkoense is a species of fern native to Japan, belonging to the Athyrium genus and classified as a type of lady fern. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Athyrium nikkoense include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce oxidative stress and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
